T0119.title: Gaming Lead
T0119.definition: An internal term used by fraud rings for groups primarily targeting online gamers.
T0119.description: Fraudsters post fake offers for low-cost top-ups, power-leveling services, or equipment trades in game chats or on trading platforms. Once a player takes the bait, they are directed to a phishing site for payment or tricked into giving up their account credentials. By exploiting players' focus on in-game assets, this type of transaction fraud has a very high incidence rate among young people.
